JLPM 1.0.4
  • Get started
  • Reference
    • Replication script for the 4Smethod

Wrapper to the Fortran subroutine that computes the log-likelihood

Source: R/jointLPM.R
loglik.Rd

Computes the log-likelihood of a jointLPM model

Usage

loglik(
  b0,
  Y0,
  X0,
  Tentr0,
  Tevt0,
  Devt0,
  ind_survint0,
  idea0,
  idg0,
  idcor0,
  idcontr0,
  idsurv0,
  idtdv0,
  typrisq0,
  nz0,
  zi0,
  nbevt0,
  idtrunc0,
  logspecif0,
  ny0,
  ns0,
  nv0,
  nobs0,
  nmes0,
  idiag0,
  ncor0,
  nalea0,
  npm0,
  nfix0,
  bfix0,
  epsY0,
  idlink0,
  nbzitr0,
  zitr0,
  uniqueY0,
  indiceY0,
  indiceYinf0,
  nvalSPLORD0,
  fix0,
  methInteg0,
  nMC0,
  dimMC0,
  seqMC0,
  idst0,
  nXcl0,
  Xcl_Ti0,
  Xcl_GK0,
  Xcs_Ti0,
  Xcs_GK0,
  nonlin0,
  centerpoly0,
  expectancy0
)

Arguments

b0

b0

Y0

Y0

X0

X0

Tentr0

Tentr0

Tevt0

Tevt0

Devt0

Devt0

ind_survint0

ind_survint0

idea0

idea0

idg0

idcor0

idcontr0

idtdv0

nz0

zi0

nbevt0

idtrunc0

logspecif0

logspecif0

ny0

ns0

ns0

nv0

nv0

nobs0

nmes0

nmes0

idiag0

idiag0

ncor0

nalea0

nalea0

npm0

nfix0

nfix0

bfix0

epsY0

nvalSPLORD0

fix0

fix0

methInteg0

methInteg0

nMC0

dimMC0

dimMC0

seqMC0

seqMC0

idst0

nXcl0

nXcl0

Xcl_Ti0

Xcl_GK0

Xcl_GK0

Xcs_Ti0

Xcs_Ti0

Xcs_GK0

Xcs_GK0

nonlin0

nonlin0

centerpoly0

centerpoly0

expectancy0

expectancy0

Value

the log-likelihood
